reasoning: The recall was issued on April 24, 2025. The resolution date is July 1, 2025, which gives a window of about 68 days (just over two months) for the recall to be officially marked as "Closed" by the FSIS. The process for closing an FSIS recall requires completing effectiveness checks to verify that all the recalled products (in this case, 65,000 pounds of pork buns) have been successfully removed from commerce or destroyed, followed by administrative review and final case closure. Typically, this process takes several months to over a year, especially for moderately large, multi-level distributions like 65,000 pounds involving an undeclared allergen. Therefore, it is highly unlikely that the FSIS investigation and administrative steps will be finalized and the status updated to "Closed" in barely over two months. I estimate the probability at 12%.
